news.headline: Lebanon to confront Israel over demolition of homes in occupied areas since ceasefire
news.summary:
In areas of southern Lebanon it has occupied since agreeing last week to a ceasefire with Hezbollah, the Israeli army has been destroying homes it says were used as outposts by the Iran-backed militant group.
But the demolitions were happening on such a wide scale that residents, Lebanese officials

news.headline: French Cup: Nice reach final after victory at Strasbourg
news.summary: Nice secured a 2–0 win away at Strasbourg in the French Cup semi-final and will face Lens in the final. Elye Wahi made the difference with a brace.
